name: Zucchini Cookies (for Shipping)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the egg and vanilla, then beat well to combine.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually mix the sifted dry ingredients into the wet mixture.
5. Stir in the shredded zucchini until fully incorporated.
6. Fold in all remaining ingredients (oatmeal, nuts, coconut, butterscotch chips) until just combined.
7. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake in a preheated 350-degree oven for 12-14 minutes or until set.
9. Allow to cool slightly before removing from the pan.
